---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.hero-eyebrow}
Open Source · v2.4.1
:::

# Build things that *actually* last.

A lightweight, composable toolkit for modern applications. Thoughtfully designed, meticulously documented, and built to grow with you.

<br>

[Read the Docs](docs/installation.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}
[View on GitHub](https://github.com/your-username/your-repo){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::

## Why MyProject?

Designed for clarity and longevity, MyProject gives your team a solid foundation without locking you into opinions you didn't choose.

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}⚡:::
**Fast by default**  
Zero-cost abstractions and tree-shaking keep bundles lean.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}🧩:::
**Composable**  
Mix and match modules. Use what you need, leave the rest.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}📖:::
**Well documented**  
Every API, pattern, and gotcha covered with real examples.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}🔒:::
**Type-safe**  
First-class TypeScript support across the entire surface.
:::
:::

## Quick Start

Get up and running in under two minutes:

```bash
# Install via npm
npm install myproject

# or yarn
yarn add myproject
```

```js
import { create } from 'myproject'

const app = create({ theme: 'warm' })
app.run()
```

::: {.callout-tip}
For a complete walkthrough, head to the [Documentation](docs/installation.qmd) section.
:::
